name: How does voice search optimization for lawyers actually work?
description: It works by combining conversational content, structured data, and strong local business signals so assistants can understand and surface your pages.

mainEntity.name: How does voice search optimization for lawyers actually work?

acceptedAnswer.text: The usual setup includes FAQ sections, service pages written in plain language, schema markup, and a complete Google Business Profile. The goal is to make it easy for search engines to identify who you are, what you do, and where you serve.
acceptedAnswer.description: It works by combining conversational content, structured data, and strong local business signals so assistants can understand and surface your pages.
